name: llm-autocorrect
description: LLM-powered code autocorrect: fixes typos/syntax errors line-by-line as you type, and offers to translate pasted code from another language.

commands.title: Autocorrect: Translate Selection to Current File's Language

autocorrect.enabled.description: Master switch for the whole extension.

autocorrect.line.enabled.description: Fix typos/syntax errors on the previous line when you press Enter.

autocorrect.paste.enabled.description: Offer to translate pasted code that looks like a different language than the current file.

autocorrect.provider.description: LLM provider. Set the API key via the 'Autocorrect: Set API Key' command (stored in VS Code secret storage, not settings).

autocorrect.model.description: Model ID. Leave empty for the provider default (groq: llama-3.1-8b-instant, gemini: gemini-2.5-flash-lite, anthropic: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001).

autocorrect.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the 'openai-compatible' provider, e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1

autocorrect.languages.description: VS Code language IDs the extension is active for. Supported: python, go, java, c, cpp, rust, zig, javascript, typescript.

autocorrect.line.requireDiagnostic.description: Only call the LLM when the language server reports an error/warning on the line (strongly recommended — kills most API calls and false corrections).

autocorrect.line.debounceMs.description: Delay after pressing Enter before checking the previous line. Also gives the language server time to publish diagnostics.

autocorrect.line.diagnosticWaitMs.description: How long to wait for a language-server diagnostic on the line before skipping (only when autocorrect.line.requireDiagnostic is true).

autocorrect.debug.description: Log skip reasons and scheduling details to the LLM Autocorrect output channel.

autocorrect.timeoutMs.description: Abort LLM requests that take longer than this.
